_comment: Reference only — NOT loaded by run_scrape.py. The live stack is fixed in agentzero/scrape/factory.py and configured via .env (AGENTZERO_SCRAPE_BROWSER_SITES, AGENTZERO_SCRAPE_SITES). This file documents the five core sources and remains for future custom list_pages boards via agentzero/scrape/sources_config.py.
rate_limiting: Sequential fetches with AGENTZERO_SCRAPE_DELAY_SECONDS. One primary title when AGENTZERO_SCRAPE_PRIMARY_QUERY_ONLY=true.
